series_metadata.series_title: Complaints aganist commercial motor carriers form
series_metadata.series_description: (HP-130) The form will be used when a citizen, employee of a motor carrier or outside law enforcement agency reports a motor carrier related complaint or violation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy until scanned into an electronic format. Review form then destroy ; Electronic: Forward electronic copy to the PUCO, Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration and to any affected OSP personnel. Retain electronic file for one year plus current, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
